idea-plugin.name: ChainlessChain IDE Bridge
idea-plugin.description:
Bridges the ChainlessChain cc agent CLI to JetBrains IDEs. Runs a localhost MCP server exposing the active selection, diagnostics, open editors, and native diff review as tools the agent can call, and injects the discovery env vars into integrated terminals so cc agent auto-connects.

With cc ≥ 0.162.39 the agent is also automatically aware of the editor: your selection and open tabs ride along with every prompt, and after the agent edits a file the IDE's fresh errors/warnings flow back into the same run. Set CC_IDE_CONTEXT=0 to opt out.

Chat tool window (right dock, "ChainlessChain"): talk to the agent without leaving the IDE — streaming replies, tool-call trace, Stop interrupts the in-flight turn, and conversations resume across IDE restarts. The chat child runs inside this window's bridge, so selection context, diagnostics feedback and native diff review all apply automatically.

action.description: Show the IDE bridge MCP server status
Guided LLM setup via cc config set + cc llm test
Open a new ChainlessChain chat conversation tab

action.text: ChainlessChain: Reopen Closed Chat (重开已关对话)
action.description: Reopen the most recently closed ChainlessChain conversation, resuming it

action.text: ChainlessChain: Explain Selection (解释选中代码)
action.description: Send the selected code to ChainlessChain chat and ask for an explanation

action.text: ChainlessChain: Refactor Selection (重构选中代码)
action.description: Send the selected code to ChainlessChain chat and ask for a refactor

action.text: ChainlessChain: Insert File Reference (@文件引用)
action.description: Insert an @file reference (with selected line range) into the ChainlessChain chat input
